title: [codex] consolidate tinybird secrets and observability tokens
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the vault
gist.blurb: We've tidied up our backend secrets and observability tokens so our infrastructure stays secure and easy to manage. Less clutter, more secure buzzing!
gist.summary: Consolidated Tinybird observability tokens and secrets across the repository to simplify key rotation and improve backend security.
gist.impact: This is an under-the-hood infrastructure update that makes our backend more maintainable without affecting any user-facing features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing glowing keys or tokens in a cozy vault or filing cabinet, representing the consolidation of backend secrets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security guard hat, organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) keys in a wooden filing cabinet. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a padlock icon. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
